items.description: Crash on PA 581 eastbound between 1 miles WEST of Exit 5: US 15 S - US 11/15 N GETTYSBURG\CAMP HILL and Exit 5: US 15 S - US 11/15 N GETTYSBURG\CAMP HILL. There is a lane restriction.
